title: TANTRA Append-Only Replay Log Schema
description: JSON Schema for replay_log.jsonl entries. Each line is a single JSON object conforming to this schema.

trace_id.description: Immutable trace identifier. Generated by Core and propagated through all services.

execution_id.description: Immutable execution identifier. Null if not yet assigned.

parent_execution_id.description: Reference to the parent execution in the lineage graph. Null for root executions.

event_type.description: Event classification. Prefix convention: telemetry:*, trace:*, continuity, idempotency, bridge:*, execution:*, bucket:*

status.description: Event status at time of recording.

payload.description: Structured event details. Contents vary by event_type.

telemetry.description: True if this is a telemetry event.

passive.description: True if this event has zero execution authority.

idempotency_key.description: Key used for distributed idempotency dedup.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of event occurrence.

parent_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous log entry. Null for the first entry. Chains consecutive records.

sequence.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number. Manages chain ordering.

hash.description: SHA-256 hash computed over all other fields (self, excluding hash). Deterministic: same inputs produce same hash.

host.description: Hostname of the originating machine. Useful for multi-node deployments.
